metadata.title: Layla
metadata.album: Layla And Other Assorted Love Songs (Remastered 2010)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:25.38] What'll you do when you get lonely
[00:29.41] And nobody's waiting by your side?
[00:33.77] You've been running and hiding much too long
[00:37.90] You know it's just your foolish pride
[00:40.65] Layla
[00:43.54] You've got me on my knees
[00:45.55] Layla
[00:47.87] I'm begging, darling, please
[00:49.57] Layla
[00:52.04] Darling, won't you ease my worried mind?
[00:57.87] I tried to give you consolation
[01:01.87] When your old man had let you down
[01:06.08] Like a fool, I fell in love with you
[01:10.13] You turned my whole world upside down
[01:12.93] Layla
[01:16.08] You've got me on my knees
[01:17.76] Layla
[01:20.12] I'm begging, darling, please
[01:21.97] Layla
[01:24.42] Darling, won't you ease my worried mind?
[01:30.06] Let's make the best of the situation
[01:34.30] Before I finally go insane
[01:38.57] Please, don't say we'll never find a way
[01:42.53] And tell me all my love's in vain
[01:45.26] Layla
[01:48.36] You've got me on my knees
[01:49.91] Layla
[01:52.69] I'm begging, darling, please
[01:54.23] Layla
[01:56.72] Darling, won't you ease my worried mind?
[02:02.67] Layla (Layla)
[02:04.92] You've got me on my knees
[02:06.83] Layla
[02:08.94] I'm begging, darling, please
[02:10.83] Layla
